name: Ultra Clean Holdings, Inc.
summary: Overview Ultra Clean Holdings, Inc., (UCT, the Company or We) is a leading developer and supplier of critical subsystems, components, parts, and ultra-high purity cleaning and analytical services primarily for the semiconductor industry.
